availableCommands.name: excel-to-ai-doc
availableCommands.description: Convert image-heavy Excel game spec spreadsheets (.xlsx) into an AI-readable knowledge structure — Markdown text + extracted original images (anchored to their source cells) + metadata.json. Use when the user wants to turn a 規格書/spec/design xlsx into something an AI or agent can read, asks to "convert this spec to markdown", "make this xlsx AI-readable", "extract images and tables from this spreadsheet for analysis", or needs to feed a slot/game spec workbook to a vision model. Triggers on game design specs, paytables, UI/flow screenshots embedded in .xlsx. NOT for clean tabular data exports (use a plain csv/markdown converter) or non-xlsx files. (user)

availableCommands.name: ms-streaming-token-pipeline
availableCommands.description: Use when a Telegram/Slack bot streams text via mid-turn edits plus a final render. Both paths must share one transform, or ASK buttons drop, half-tokens leak, and rate-limit recovery overwrites it. (user)

availableCommands.name: ms-telegram-ask-button-protocol

availableCommands.name: ms-telegram-bot-rate-limit-survival

availableCommands.name: ms-wiki-knowledge-base

Use when the user asks to automate a web task (search, filter, form-fill, multi-step flow, data extraction) and wants reusable scripts plus screenshot evidence rather than a one-shot answer.

availableCommands.name: chrome-devtools
availableCommands.description: (chrome-devtools-mcp) Uses Chrome DevTools via MCP for efficient debugging, troubleshooting and browser automation. Use when debugging web pages, automating browser interactions, analyzing performance, or inspecting network requests. This skill does not apply to `--slim` mode (MCP configuration).

availableCommands.name: chrome-devtools-cli
availableCommands.description: (chrome-devtools-mcp) Use this skill to write shell scripts or run shell commands to automate tasks in the browser or otherwise use Chrome DevTools via CLI.

availableCommands.name: debug-optimize-lcp
availableCommands.description: (chrome-devtools-mcp) Guides debugging and optimizing Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) using Chrome DevTools MCP tools. Use this skill whenever the user asks about LCP performance, slow page loads, Core Web Vitals optimization, or wants to understand why their page's main content takes too long to appear. Also use when the user mentions "largest contentful paint", "page load speed", "CWV", or wants to improve how fast their hero image or main content renders.

availableCommands.name: memory-leak-debugging
availableCommands.description: (chrome-devtools-mcp) Diagnoses and resolves memory leaks in JavaScript/Node.js applications. Use when a user reports high memory usage, OOM errors, or wants to analyze heapsnapshots or run memory leak detection tools like memlab.

availableCommands.name: troubleshooting
availableCommands.description: (chrome-devtools-mcp) Uses Chrome DevTools MCP and documentation to troubleshoot connection and target issues. Trigger this skill when list_pages, new_page, or navigate_page fail, or when the server initialization fails.

availableCommands.name: design-sync
availableCommands.description: Push a React design system to claude.ai/design. This runs a converter that bundles the real component code (from Storybook or a bare package) and uploads it. Use when the user runs /design-sync or says "sync my design system to Claude Design".

availableCommands.name: dataviz
availableCommands.description: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".

availableCommands.name: update-config
availableCommands.description: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.

availableCommands.name: verify
availableCommands.description: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.

availableCommands.name: debug
availableCommands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues

availableCommands.name: code-review
availableCommands.description: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.

availableCommands.name: simplify
availableCommands.description: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.

availableCommands.name: batch
availableCommands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR.

availableCommands.name: fewer-permission-prompts
availableCommands.description: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.

availableCommands.name: doctor
availableCommands.description: Health-check the user's Claude Code setup and fix issues: diagnose installation health — what the `claude doctor` terminal diagnostics cover — from local data (duplicate or leftover installs, PATH, unparseable settings files, broken or colliding agent definitions); find unused skills, MCP servers, and plugins versus their context cost and disable dead weight; deduplicate local CLAUDE.md files against checked-in ones; trim checked-in CLAUDE.md files by cutting content a session could derive from the codebase (directory layouts, tech-stack lists, architecture overviews) while keeping gotchas, rationale, and non-standard conventions; migrate always-loaded CLAUDE.md guidance into lazy skills and nested CLAUDE.md files; flag slow hooks and context-heavy extensions; check the installed version is current; make auto mode the default permission mode; and pre-approve frequently denied read-only commands. Use when the user asks for a doctor run, checkup, audit, tune-up, or cleanup of their Claude Code setup or configuration.

availableCommands.name: loop
availableCommands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace.

availableCommands.name: schedule
availableCommands.description: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule.

availableCommands.name: claude-api
availableCommands.description:
Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).

availableCommands.name: run
availableCommands.description: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

availableCommands.name: run-skill-generator
availableCommands.description: Author or improve the run-<unit> skill — a per-project skill that tells agents how to build, launch, and drive this project's app. Use when the user asks to set up the project, get it running, write run instructions, or verify build/run steps work from a clean environment.

availableCommands.name: agents
availableCommands.description: (removed) Ask Claude to create/manage subagents, or edit .claude/agents/

availableCommands.description: Start a new session with empty context; previous session stays on disk (resumable with /resume)

availableCommands.description: Dump the JS heap to ~/Desktop

prompt.text:
[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），應含五要素：
  1. 目標與動機 2. 已知背景（已掌握的事實/證據） 3. 待決問題 4. 驗收條件 5. 回報格式
- context 模式選擇：
  - 決策型（方案取捨/設計判斷）：自己打包 context brief 進 goal，精簡但完整
  - 調查型（code review/跨檔驗證）：goal 裡給檔案路徑+問題，讓 specialist 自己讀 code 調查
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token
- 結果回來後：給 delegate 結論認真權重（獨立視角）；僅在經驗性失敗或一手資料矛盾時才不採納；整合後簡要告知使用者

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Environment — machine-specific paths the bridge resolved for this session]
Skills and notes that need filesystem paths should reference these variables,
not hard-coded values. This lets the same SKILL.md work on multiple machines.
- MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory
- SKILL_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\skills
- AGENT_CONFIG_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude
- USER_ID=509424983
Conventions: sessions are under ${MEMORY_DIR}/sessions/, archived under
${MEMORY_DIR}/oldSessions/, master fact log at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts-${USER_ID}.md,
topic shards at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts_Topic/${USER_ID}/<topic>.md.
Agent-wide config files (agent configs) live under
${AGENT_CONFIG_DIR}/.
Specialist 歷史產出存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/artifacts/（結構化 JSON），需要時用 read tool 查閱。
[End environment]

[Project context — AI.md layered loading]
工作目錄可能有 `AI.md` 檔案記錄該項目/目錄的上下文要點。
規則：讀到或修改某目錄的檔案時，檢查該目錄及上層（最多 3 層）有無 AI.md。
有就用 read tool 讀取作為工作上下文。同 session 同一個 AI.md 只需讀一次。
多層都有時全部讀（根先子後）。AI.md ≤2000 字，寫架構/慣例/踩坑/測試指引。
主動寫入：在某目錄新增≥3檔案、做架構性改動、或踩坑修復時，主動建立/更新 AI.md。
SPEC：任務≥3工項且跨≥2檔案時先開 SPEC.md；完成工項標 [x]；session 結束前更新進度。
預設行為是寫，不是不寫。詳見 POLICIES/proactive-write-policy.md。
CodeGraph：首次對某專案做修改或追呼叫鏈時，用 codegraph_status(projectPath) 檢查該專案有無索引。
有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。
無索引→回報使用者，建議建立。已知有索引的專案以 codegraph_status 回傳為準。
[End project context]

[User profile — structured identity and preferences]
# User Profile

## 身份
- 遊戲公司（IGS）開發者
- 做 UK 市場老虎機（slot）遊戲
- 技術棧：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + Astarte Framework
- 個人 AI 專案：telegram-kiro-bridge（Telegram ↔ ACP agent 橋接器）

## 溝通風格
- 繁體中文為主
- 簡潔直接，不需寒暄
- 回覆含選項時用 ASK button，減少手打
- 重要決策先列選項再問，不要代替決定

## 工作偏好
- Git commit message 用中文
- Git commit 前先確認，不逕自 commit
- HTML 報告要有目錄錨點跳轉
- PDF 工作流：HTML+CSS → Playwright headless Chromium
- 進入 UK slot 專案時主動建 AI.md（不限改動檔案數）
- 方法/函式命名用大駝峰（PascalCase）—— 限 UK slot 專案

## Agent 設定偏好
- Steering 雙軌：closed-loop（主 agent 長 session）+ karpathy-guardrails（specialist/短任務）
- Context budget discipline：研究前先估量，偏好精簡策略
- 自我改進優先級：Context Budget > ASK 強制觸發 > 其他
- Skill 正本放 G:\AI\AI-canonical（通用）或 AI-canonical-corp（slot）

## 工作節奏
- 主要工作時間：白天（台灣時區 UTC+8）
- /dream 夜間維運：每日 04:00
- 靜默時段偏好：深夜不打擾
[End user profile]

[Memory topics — 198 older facts (plus any newer ones), sharded at facts_Topic/509424983/]
- uk-slot (51): uk_pirates_queen, uk_slot, uk slot
- bridge-project (32): telegram-kiro-bridge, desktop-pet, bridge 專案
- bridge-acp (23): claude-agent-acp, kiro-cli acp, kiro-cli chat

If the user asks about a topic above and the recent facts don't cover it,
call the `list_facts` MCP tool with the topic name — the server reads
that shard file directly, e.g. `list_facts({ query: "bridge-token" })`.
Use query="" and tail=0 only if you genuinely need the full set.
[End topics]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.
Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.
Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.
ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.
Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.
MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old
→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.
Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.
CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>
before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]
first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.
[End agent disciplines]

[Wiki knowledge base — structured pages at ${MEMORY_DIR}/wiki/]
- [[uk-slot]] — UK 市場老虎機專案群（1 模板 + 7 遊戲 + 1 demo、codegen 整合、Clash of Olympus、spec-to-impl 教訓、回灌工作流、錯誤分類法）
- [[uk-917]] — uk_917 3 Leprechaun's Pots（遊戲輪廓、M0a 進度、proto stub、規格確認事項）
- [[bridge-project]] — Telegram-Kiro-Bridge 專案（架構、AIMemory、Rich Messages、Reply Context、Smoke 隔離、Specialist Dashboard、Status Server 加固）
- [[bridge-acp]] — Bridge ACP 與 Model 配置（adapter 切換差異、/agent 熱切換、model pin、harness hooks、trailer 陷阱）
- [[bridge-session]] — Bridge Session 生命週期（archive 蒸餾層、ACP resume、/session 多 session、transcript 路徑）
- [[bridge-streaming]] — Bridge Streaming 與訊息渲染（Draft API 三階段 lifecycle、4096 截斷、rate limit、Rich Messages）
- [[bridge-memory]] — Bridge 記憶與維運系統（AIMemory 結構、/dream 14 步維運、factlint 三層防禦、topic 分類、wiki 知識庫、embedding router、備份）
- [[bridge-specialist]] — Bridge Specialist 分身系統（配置、token 執行權限層、PARALLEL_DELEGATE cross-check、Dashboard 監控）
- [[bridge-research]] — Bridge 改善研究與 Roadmap（外部框架借鏡、Rich Messages PoC、PostTool Hooks A→D、Karpathy P0/P1、Ruflo）
- [[dev-tools]] — 開發工具與環境設定（Python/Playwright/TypeScript、機器路徑、工作流程）
- [[agent-system-architecture]] — Agent 系統五層架構（公司比喻：Agent/MCP/Memory/Workflow/Agent SDK 的角色與關係）
- [[spine-viewer]] — Spine Viewer 插件（Cocos Creator 編輯器擴充，批次掃描 DrawCall/Triangle 效能報告）
- [[ai-strategy]] — 跨模型 AI 策略（正典語料庫架構、投影分發、headless 安全機制）
- [[skill-and-eval]] — Skill 評估與管理（方法論整合、工具評估決策）[歷史頁面，topic 已併入其他分類]
- [[uk-slot-pitfalls]] — UK Slot 踩坑經驗（Layout 退場重排、Promise.all race condition、ghost slot 雙佔位）
- [[skill-candidates]] — 未成熟 Skill 候選追蹤（pattern、count、觀察點）
- [[fable]] — Claude Fable 5 修正 Karpathy P0 接線 Bug（7 個問題 + 教訓 + commit）
- [[modelcontextprotocol-typescript-sdk-mcp-typescript-sdk-v-f2c3525b]] — MCP TypeScript SDK v2 beta（套件拆分 server/client、任意 schema 庫、stateless core）
- [[askintel-time-split]] — Intel 排程分割策略（輕量 daily + 重量 podcast 隔天）
- [[trio-model-architecture]] — 三模型協作架構評析（借鏡點、疑點、與 bridge 差異）
- [[embedding-router]] — 為何 doctor 報 Embedding router 未就緒（根因、影響面、解耦修復）
- [[modelcontextprotocol-typescript-sdk-mcp-typescript-sdk-v-a1aded4e]] — MCP TypeScript SDK v2 正式進入 beta（2026-07-28 規範、套件拆分、任意 schema 庫、stateless core）

When a question relates to a wiki page above, read the full page with
`read` tool at `${MEMORY_DIR}/wiki/<type>/<slug>.md` before answering.
[End wiki]

[Passive Monitor] 你是被排程喚醒的 ambient agent。執行以下檢查，只有發現異常才回報，全部正常就回「✅」一個字不多說：1) 檢查目前有無 active /goal 卡住（status）2) 看 dailylog 今天有無「進行中」超過 8 小時沒更新的項目 3) 檢查 schedules.json 有無過期未觸發的排程 4) 磁碟空間（MEMORY_DIR 所在碟）若剩餘 <5GB 警告。發現問題時簡述問題+建議動作。

rawInput.command: ls "G:/AI/AIMemory" | head -30; echo ---; cat "G:/AI/AIMemory/schedules.json" 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo ---; df -h /g 2>/dev/null || powershell -NoProfile -Command "(Get-PSDrive G).Free/1GB"
rawInput.description: Check MEMORY_DIR contents, schedules, and disk space
